title: Two Ends of the Okanagan Valley’s Style Spectrum
summary:
The Okanagan Valley gets little attention from American wine drinkers. One could say that for Canadian wines in general terms. Aside from Icewine, little of it is imported. But while the Niagara escarpment enjoys a proximity to Buffalo and makes an easy add-on to a visit to Niagara Falls, the Okanagan is some distance from […]

title: Wind Beneath the Wines
summary:
